Arena.description: Arena mode type identifier (e.g. Deathmatch). Not read by 1.13c engine

Suicide.description: Score penalty applied when a player kills themselves. Not read by 1.13c engine

PlayerKill.description: Score awarded for killing another player. Not read by 1.13c engine

PlayerKillPercent.description: Percentage of victim score transferred to killer on player kill. Not read by 1.13c engine

MonsterKill.description: Score awarded for killing a monster in arena mode

PlayerDeath.description: Score penalty applied when a player is killed by another player. Not read by 1.13c engine

PlayerDeathPercent.description: Percentage of score lost when killed by another player. Not read by 1.13c engine

MonsterDeath.description: Score penalty applied when killed by a monster in arena mode
